mapper.insert:
select seq_crm_user_profile.nextval as id from DUAL
insert into crm_user_profile ( id, user_id, customer_count, opportunity_count, win_rate, total_amount, industry_distribution, region_distribution, monthly_performance, update_time ) values ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{customerCount}, #{opportunityCount}, #{winRate}, #{totalAmount}, #{industryDistribution}, #{regionDistribution}, #{monthlyPerformance}, sysdate )
mapper.update: update crm_user_profile set customer_count = #{customerCount}, opportunity_count = #{opportunityCount}, win_rate = #{winRate}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, industry_distribution = #{industryDistribution}, region_distribution = #{regionDistribution}, monthly_performance = #{monthlyPerformance}, update_time = sysdate where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from crm_customer where create_by = #{createBy}
select count(1) from crm_opportunity where create_by = #{createBy}
select count(1) from crm_opportunity o inner join crm_opportunity_stage s on o.stage_id = s.id where o.create_by = #{createBy} and s.stage_code = 'WIN'
select nvl(sum(contract_amount), 0) from crm_contract where create_by = #{createBy}
select count(1) from crm_contract c inner join crm_contract_status s on c.status_id = s.id where c.create_by = #{createBy} and s.status_code in ('ACTIVE', 'ARCHIVED')
select count(1) from crm_contract where create_by = #{createBy}
select count(1) from crm_oper_log where operator = #{operator} and operate_time >= sysdate - 30

select s.stage_name as "name", count(1) as "value" from crm_opportunity o inner join crm_opportunity_stage s on o.stage_id = s.id where o.create_by = #{createBy} group by s.stage_name, s.sort_order order by s.sort_order
